input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.3.8 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.3.8
            TITLE: each accumulator container must be labelled with the:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.3.8: Each Accumulator Container must be labelled with the:
EV.4.3.8 Each Accumulator Container must be labelled with the:  
a. School Name and Vehicle Number  
b. Symbol specified in ISO 7010-W012  (triangle with black lightning bolt on yellow 
background) with triangle side length of 100 mm minimum 
c. Text “Always Energized”  
d. Text “High Voltage” if the voltage meets T.9.1.1

final_answer: Each Accumulator Container must be labelled with the: a. School Name and Vehicle Number b. Symbol specified in ISO 7010-W012 (triangle with black lightning bolt on yellow background) with triangle side length of 100 mm minimum c. Text “Always Energized” d. Text “High Voltage” if the voltage meets T.9.1.1
